tool.name: Webatlas Build config
tool.command: python "$images_script" && python "$options_script" && /usr/local/bin/build_config.py #if $project: --project '$project' #end if #if $dataset: --dataset '$dataset' #end if ##add comma for list --file_paths "[ #for $file in $input_file_paths: /api/datasets/${__app__.security.encode_id($file.id)}/display #end for ]" --images "\$(cat images.json)" --url ${__app__.config.galaxy_infrastructure_url} --options "\$(cat options.json)" #if $layout: --layout '$layout' #end if #if $custom_layout: --custom_layout '$custom_layout' #end if #if $title: --title '$title' #end if #if $config_filename_suffix: --config_filename_suffix '$config_filename_suffix' #end if && mv $project-$dataset-'$config_filename_suffix'* $output_json

configfiles.configfile:
import json
images = {"raw": [], "label": []}
#for $img in $rep_images image_type = "${img.input_image_type}" ##zarr_name = "${img.input_image.metadata.store_root}" zarr_name = "/api/datasets/${__app__.security.encode_id($img.input_image.id)}/display" metadata_path = "${img.input_metadata}"
with open(metadata_path) as md_file: md = json.load(md_file)
images[image_type].append({ "path": zarr_name, "md": md }) #end for
clean_dict = {} for key, value in images.items(): if value: clean_dict[key] = value images = clean_dict
with open("images.json", "w") as file: json.dump(images, file)

param.name: input_file_paths
param.label: Zarr file(s) generated by 'Webatlas Process files'

param.name: input_image
param.label: Zarr file generated by 'Webatlas Consolidate Metadata'

param.name: input_metadata
param.label: JSON file generated by 'Webatlas OME Zarr Metadata'

param.name: spatial
param.label: Where the Anndata object holds the spatial coordinates

param.name: pca_dim1
param.label: Dimension 1
param.help: First dimension to be plotted (e.g. PC1)

param.name: pca_dim2
param.label: Dimension 2
param.help: Second dimension to be plotted (e.g. PC2)

param.name: factors
param.label: Factors
param.help: Comma-separated list of useful metadata to show per cell when hovering over them in the visualization. Example input: sample. 'obs/' gets prepended automatically.

param.name: sets
param.label: Sets
param.help: Comma-separated list of keys for grouping cells. Example input for a simple set: 'cluster'. Example input for a scored set: 'celltype:celltype_prob'. Example input for both together: 'cluster, celltype:celltype_prob'

param.name: layout
param.label: Layout
param.help: Type of predefined layout to use. Default value: minimal

param.name: custom_layout
param.label: Custom layout
param.help: String defining a Vitessce layout following its alternative syntax. https://vitessce.github.io/vitessce-python/api_config.html#vitessce.config.VitessceConfig.layout https://github.com/vitessce/vitessce-python/blob/1e100e4f3f6b2389a899552dffe90716ffafc6d5/vitessce/config.py#L855

param.name: title
param.label: Title
param.help: Data title to show in the visualization.

param.name: title
param.value: Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment

tool.help:
.. class:: infomark
